title: Device Home Screen - Zoom out the application to verify that it remains the same
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app correctly restores home screen and Device Settings screen state after switching via app switcher
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with a connected Bluetooth audio device.
3. Verify the app preview shows the Home screen correctly.
4. Tap the app preview to return to full screen.
5. Verify the app is on the same Home screen (no unexpected navigation or restart).
6. From the Home screen, tap the "..." (More) button to open Device Settings.
8. Verify the app preview shows the Device Settings screen correctly.
9. Tap the app preview to return to full screen.
10. Verify the app remains on the same Device Settings screen (no unexpected navigation or restart).
expected: The app maintains its state correctly when switching away and back via the app switcher. The preview shows the correct screen (Home or Device Settings), and returning to full screen keeps the app on the same screen without restarting or navigating away.
